text:
Staff of the Sun (太陽の錫杖, Taiyō no Shakujō) or Scepter of the Sun is an anime-only artifact that was present in the 1999 anime adaptation of Hunter × Hunter. Hunter × Hunter - Episode 18 (1999) 

Appearance

The staff features a highly decorated orb-like top embedded with a sea of jewels, topped in sequence by a miniature crown and a circular, framed accent. Its bottom end is set apart from the shaft by a cluster of pearl-like gems and adorned with intricate ceremonial designs. 

Plot

Hunter Exam arc

During the bonus stage of the Third Phase of the Hunter Exam, this legendary staff is found by Gon. According to Kurapika, it was a gift that was supposed to be presented to the Queen of Ing in the 18 th century. Kurapika estimates it to be worth a ridiculous amount of money. 

Trivia

In the subtitled version of the 1999 anime adaptation, its name is specifically "Scepter of the Sun". 
Although Kurapika recognizes the Staff of the Sun as such, shortly afterward, he ponders that the object could just be an antique bedpost. 

Intertextuality and References

The Staff of the Sun design closely resembles the 17 th century sceptre part of the Austrian Crown Jewels.
